reports.title: 2026 Global M&A Outlook: Think Big, Build Bigger
reports.summary: Goldman's flagship outlook frames 2026 around technology, globalization, and ambition. Global M&A volumes rose 40% YoY into the year, with AI driving an 'innovation supercycle' and private equity now ~40% of the market.

reports.title: US Deals 2026 Midyear Outlook
reports.summary: A bifurcated, 'K-shaped' market: US deal value reached $1.2T in the first five months of 2026 — nearly double a year ago — even as volume dipped 4%. Megadeals ($5B+) are up 50%+ and driving the headline numbers.

reports.title: Global M&A Activity Outlook: Can the Resurgence Continue in 2026?
reports.summary: Five forces shaping 2026: AI infrastructure demand, sponsor monetization pressure, corporate breakups, cross-border appetite (notably Japan), and a deepening minority-capital market for founder-led companies.

reports.title: M&A Report 2026: Trends & Outlook
reports.summary: Bain's annual deep-dive on the 2025 rebound and what it means for 2026, including how AI acquisitions change the diligence playbook. 2025 reached an estimated $4.9T in deal value — the second-highest year on record.

reports.title: 2026 M&A Trends Pulse Survey
reports.summary: Survey-based read on dealmaker sentiment amid intensifying volatility. Notes that one-third of 2025 US deal value came from just 20 very large transactions — leaving ample opportunity in small- and mid-cap deals for prepared buyers.

reports.title: Goldman Sachs, JPMorgan Lead 1Q26 M&A Rankings
reports.summary: Quarterly league-table analysis: Goldman, JPMorgan, and Morgan Stanley took the podium by value; Houlihan Lokey led by deal count. Useful for benchmarking which advisers are winning which mandates right now.

reports.title: Global M&A Trends in Consumer Markets: 2026 Outlook
reports.summary: Sector-specific outlook for consumer & retail M&A: a gradual uplift expected as valuations recover, with spin-offs, carve-outs, and take-privates accelerating. Cites Unilever's Ice Cream spin-off as a template for the reset.

reports.title: Global M&A Insights 2025: Trends & Outlook for 2026
reports.summary: Legal-adviser perspective on dealmaking momentum, regulatory shifts, and practical guidance for structuring cross-border transactions in 2026.
